{{CargoOrgan
|name=Fire Slug's Eye
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10816
|idx=17
|description="We found a marvelous slug with a large tail around the Harveys volcano, they can swim in hot lava!"
—Solace Expedition Notes
|skill=
|hp=1000
|def=76
|atk=101
|rush=141
|gene1=Lottery White Orbs change colors by +5%
|gene2=In explorations, {race} RUSH +20
|gene3=Lottery White Orbs change colors by +5%
|gene7=In explorations, {race} RUSH +60 (Awakened)
|}}
